Q3 2025 Quarterly Report

Revenue: $4.2M (up 23% YoY)
Operating Expenses: $2.8M
Net Income: $1.4M
Customer Count: 1,247 (up from 892)

Key Highlights:
- Launched enterprise tier in July, contributing $800K in new ARR
- Reduced churn rate from 5.2% to 3.1% through improved onboarding
- Hired 12 new engineers, bringing total headcount to 67
- Closed Series B at $45M valuation

Risks:
- Dependency on single cloud provider (AWS) for 94% of infrastructure
- Two large enterprise deals ($500K+ ARR each) still in negotiation
- Engineering velocity slowed in August due to tech debt sprint
